title: This Arab proverb explains why faith alone isn't enough: ‘Trust in God, but tie your camel’
summary_full: The profound proverb, 'Tie your camel and trust in God,' expresses the crucial balance between faith and practical efforts. Originating from Islamic teachings, it conveys that we should rely on divine support for uncontrollable aspects but also take charge of our duties. This timeless advice continues to be significant, serving as a reminder for individuals to proactively tackle life's uncertainties while maintaining their spiritual convictions.
